mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTACHMENTS ( ref_id, ref_type, file_type, file_name, file_path, save_name, upload_date ) VALUES ( #{refId}, #{refType}, #{fileType}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{saveName}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID, REF_ID, REF_TYPE, FILE_TYPE, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, SAVE_NAME, UPLOAD_DATE FROM ATTACHMENTS WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
